taxonomy: Chodaphyton ericifolium belongs to the family of plants known as Santalaceae, which is a family of parasitic flowering plants. This plant is part of the order Santalales, a group of plants that are primarily parasitic or hemiparasitic. The classification of Chodaphyton ericifolium is further supported by its placement within the genus Chodaphyton, which is a monotypic genus containing only one species. At the kingdom level, Chodaphyton ericifolium is classified as Plantae, indicating its membership in the plant kingdom. Overall, the classification of Chodaphyton ericifolium reflects its unique characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
